news-global-econ.title: Trump declares ‘national emergency,’ demands housing overhaul bill be scrapped in SAVE Act push
news-global-econ.description: President Donald Trump canceled a housing bill signing and declared a "national emergency" as he ramps up pressure on Congress to pass election legislation.
